title: hieracium caesium subsp. fioniae
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. fioniae, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The lesser hawkweed is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include the treatment of digestive issues, skin conditions, and wounds, as well as its ability to aid in the removal of toxins from the body. The herbal preparations of lesser hawkweed typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's leaves, flowers, and roots.
